name: Chicken Fajitas 2
recipeIngredient: 3 peppers (red, yellow, and green), cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet.
2. Saute onion and peppers until tender. Remove from skillet and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, brown chicken tenderloins.
4. Add French's Fajita Seasonings and water to the skillet. Blend well.
5. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 3-5 minutes.
6. Return vegetables to the skillet and add Lindsay Sliced Ripe Olives and tomato wedges.
7. To serve, portion chicken mixture onto warm tortillas and garnish with Durkee Salsa Party Dips, Durkee Guacamole Party Dips, and fresh chopped cilantro.
